mapper.sql: device_trust_id, user_id, device_id_hash, device_name, platform_code, last_ip_address, last_ip_hash, is_initial, status_code, last_used_at, registered_via, created_at, updated_at, deleted_yn, deleted_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM USER_TRUSTED_DEVICES WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY is_initial DESC, created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USER_TRUSTED_DEVICES WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status_code = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_TRUSTED_DEVICES ( user_id, device_id_hash, device_name, platform_code, last_ip_address, last_ip_hash, is_initial, status_code, registered_via, created_at, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{deviceIdHash}, #{deviceName}, #{platformCode}, #{lastIpAddress, typeHandler=AesTypeHandler}, #{lastIpHash}, #{isInitial}, #{statusCode}, #{registeredVia}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_TRUSTED_DEVICES SET last_ip_address = #{lastIpAddress, typeHandler=AesTypeHandler}, last_ip_hash = #{lastIpHash}, last_used_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE device_trust_id = #{deviceTrustId}

UPDATE USER_TRUSTED_DEVICES SET deleted_yn = 'Y', deleted_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', status_code = 'DISABLED' WHERE device_trust_id = #{deviceTrustId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
